"C:\Program Files (x86)\JetBrains\CLion 2020.3\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\CreateProject.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\CreateProject.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\CreateProject.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g  -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\CreateProject.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o CreateProject.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libCreateProject.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\CreateProject.dir\linklibs.rsp
